description: AttendHRM is open and you are logged in as admin (admin/admin) using the Demo Company database. The Q4 HR compliance audit has identified three categories of data issues that must be corrected. Update the branch assignments for employees currently assigned to branch ID 99: EMP 108 (Reid Ryan), EMP 148 (Jack West), and EMP 120 (Jessica Owens) must be moved to London (branch ID 101), and EMP 135 (Daisy Brooks) must be moved to Norwich (branch ID 102). Correct the department assignments for EMP 113 (Miller Russell) to the Accounts department and EMP 137 (Ryan Murphy) to the Information Technology department. Import the five new Q4 hires from the 'q4_new_hires.csv' file located on the Desktop.
